methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 20 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Galvanick operates in Defense & Security at the SPAC stage, having raised $16M to date. The comparable universe spans 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private counterparts including Anduril Industries, True Anomaly, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI. However, the narrow peer set poses significant methodological constraints.

Peer-median valuation could not be reliably applied due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables within Defense & Security. Only 2 same-stage peers exist in the universe; filtering for valuation tier or developmental proximity yielded fewer than 3 datapoints, falling short of minimum threshold for defensible median estimation. Drawing on the broader 20-company Defense & Security sector set would introduce substantial heterogeneity across business models, maturity, and technology focus, undermining comparability. This gap precludes the standard triangulation framework from producing a credible range.

Without applicable quantitative methods supported by adequate peer density, valuation must remain suspended pending either: (1) disclosure of Galvanick's operating metrics and customer traction, enabling revenue or growth multiple anchoring; (2) identification of additional same-stage or functionally analogous Defense & Security peers; or (3) specification of transaction structure and terms from the SPAC process. The current dataset supports documentation of the comparable landscape but not point or range estimation.
